events.label: 2018 TRY Pressure Starts
events.description: USD/TRY begins accelerated depreciation. US sanctions threat amplifies EM selloff.

events.label: 2018 TRY Freefall
events.description: USD/TRY doubles in 12 months. US tariffs on Turkish steel announced. ISE_USD −45% in 2018. Erdogan publicly refuses CBRT rate hikes.

events.label: CBRT Governor Sacked
events.description: Third central bank chief fired in two years after hiking rates. TRY loses 15% in a single trading day.

events.label: 2021 Lira Collapse
events.description: Erdogan's unorthodox rate-cut cycle amid 21%+ inflation. USD/TRY >13 (from 8). ISE_USD −40% in USD terms.

events.label: CPI Peaks at 85%
events.description: Turkish CPI hits 85.5% YoY. Dollarization accelerates. Local BIST gains mask ongoing USD-denominated collapse.

events.label: Policy Normalisation Begins
events.description: Finance minister Şimşek signals orthodox policy. CBRT begins hiking from 8.5% toward eventual 50%.

events.label: CBRT Rate Reaches 50%
events.description: Policy rate stabilises at 50%. TRY volatility normalises. ISE_USD begins gradual recovery.
